nasb.text: “Son of man, set your face toward Jerusalem, and speak against the sanctuaries and prophesy against the land of Israel;

esv.text: “Son of man, set your face toward Jerusalem and preach against the sanctuaries. Prophesy against the land of Israel

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要面向耶路撒冷，向聖所發言，說預言攻擊以色列地，

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要面向耶路撒冷，说预言斥责以色列和圣所，
